catalogRulesList.ruleDescription: Out of range date values < Threshold

catalogRulesList.ruleExpression: SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.telecom_churn_data` WHERE Monthly_Charges > 100 AND Total_Charges < 2000 AND Tenure_Months < 12 AND Churn = true;
SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.telecom_churn_data` WHERE Customer_Satisfaction < 3 AND Support_Calls > 5 AND Billing_Issues > 3 AND Complaints > 2;

catalogRulesList.ruleDescription: Entire Dataset record count deviates from history < Threshold

catalogRulesList.ruleExpression: SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.telecom_churn_data` WHERE Senior_Citizen = 1 AND Tenure_Months < 6 AND Churn = true AND Monthly_Charges > 70;

catalogRulesList.ruleDescription: Out of range date values < Threshold

catalogRulesList.ruleExpression: SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE DATEDIFF(TransactionDate2, TransactionDate) > 1 AND SettlementCode = 10 AND Instrument = 'Fixed Income';
SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE TransactionDate = TransactionDate2 AND AgentId IS NOT NULL AND Instrument IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE ABS(DATEDIFF(TransactionDate, TransactionDate2)) > 1 AND TranId > 0 AND AgentId != '';
SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE TransactionDate <> TransactionDate2 AND CommissionAmount <> 0 AND Instrument IS NOT NULL AND AgentId IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE TransactionDate2 < TransactionDate AND AgentId IS NOT NULL AND Instrument IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE TransactionDate <> TransactionDate2 AND CommissionAmount <> 0 AND Instrument IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE Instrument = 'Fixed Income' AND SettlementCode > 1000 AND TransactionAmount <= 20000 AND AgentId IS NOT NULL;
TransactionAmount=1 OR TransactionAmount=2 OR TransactionAmount=3 OR TransactionAmount=4 OR TransactionAmount=5 OR TransactionAmount=6 OR TransactionAmount=7
SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE dayofweek(TransactionDate) IN (1,7) AND Instrument = 'Fixed Income' AND CommissionAmount <= 200 AND AgentId IS NOT NULL;
